summary: Frontend-only playwright testing of iter_27 shortcut-native install / auto-prompt push flow on VendorLanding. Fully validated iOS Safari (web scan) path: '+' button and push-ios-hint pill both invoke navigator.share directly (no informational modal, no HelpDialog). Confirmed 'qrhub-install-pulse' animated class on the ios-hint. Confirmed Notification.requestPermission is NOT auto-called in web-scan mode. Confirmed 'Notifiche bloccate — riabilita' fallback renders when permission=denied in standalone (auto-prompt correctly skipped). Standalone auto-prompt firing for iOS/Android could not be independently observed due to playwright add_init_script accumulation across scenarios in the same context — code review of the useEffect at PushSubscribe.js:219-240 shows correct guards (fires once via autoPromptFiredRef, only when standalone + permission==='default' + !subscribed + vendorId).
action_items: Optional: manually verify auto-prompt on real iOS/Android standalone launch (or in a fresh browser context per scenario) — code path is correct but not directly observed in this run due to test-harness init-script accumulation.
critical_code_review_comments: PushSubscribe.js:71 — useState(Notification.permission) reads live browser value at mount; combined with `permission !== 'default'` guard in auto-prompt effect, this is correct behavior (denied/granted skip).
AddToHomeDialog.js:67-107 tryNativeInstall — clean separation Android(deferredPrompt)/iOS-Safari(share)/needs-modal; AbortError treated as share-cancelled (no modal) — good UX.

VendorLanding.js:723-745 — '+' button correctly hidden in isStandalone; onClick fires tryNativeInstall and only opens modal for 'needs-modal' outcome (share-cancelled respected). Behavior matches spec.
VendorLanding.css:99-109 .qrhub-install-pulse — properly reuses same keyframes as .map-btn--install and respects prefers-reduced-motion.
PushSubscribe.js:325-356 iosLocked block — click now goes through tryNativeInstall(); falls back to HelpDialog only for iOS Chrome/Firefox ('needs-modal'). Pulse class present. Verified visually.

Potential edge: PushSubscribe.js:325 iosLocked applies to ANY iOS non-standalone including iOS Chrome/Firefox — tryNativeInstall for iOS non-safari returns 'needs-modal' so HelpDialog opens; consistent.
Minor: setupPWA (VendorLanding.js:337) registers a service worker on every landing view; make sure /qrhub-sw.js is stable — not tested here.
test_credentials: admin@example.com / admin123 (cookie-session), preview token issued via POST /api/vendors/{id}/preview-token
seed_data_creation: None — used existing vendor 6a393fb7f85d3846a0034704 with admin preview token to bypass DPA gate.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All existing seed vendors are DPA-pending — public /v/{id} shows dpa-pending block. To test landing UI, obtain preview token: POST /api/vendors/{id}/preview-token (admin cookie) and append ?preview={token}. Playwright add_init_script accumulates across page.goto within same context — for isolated per-scenario UA/matchMedia mocking, use browser.new_context() per scenario or override via CDP Emulation. Init script for auto-prompt: `Object.defineProperty(navigator,'standalone',{value:true,configurable:true}); window.matchMedia=(q)=>({matches:q.includes('standalone'),media:q,addEventListener(){},removeEventListener(){},addListener(){},removeListener(){},dispatchEvent(){return true}}); class MockNotification{}; MockNotification.permission='default'; MockNotification.requestPermission=async()=>{window.__notifCalls++;return 'granted';}; window.Notification=MockNotification;` — set BEFORE goto.
rca of the issue: No production issue found; all observable behaviors match iter_27 spec (share sheet shortcut on iOS Safari, pulsating ios-hint, modal fallback for non-supported combos, auto-prompt guard chain correct in code).
